name: dark-temple
summary: A sanctuary to a foul or forgotten god — a processional nave, pews or kneeling-benches facing a central altar, an icon of the deity dominating the back wall.

primary_palette.note: classic dark temple — altar and icon at apse, pews in the nave
smaller cult shrine — kneeling benches instead of pews
ossuary-temple — the dead are the congregation
demon-temple — the altar is a pool, the god answers directly
cathedral-style, complete with a massive pipe organ

story_prompts: active congregation — candles lit, an evening rite in progress
long-abandoned temple, pews rotting, the idol still watching
desecrated temple retaken by a worse cult, both iconographies present
drow temple to Lolth, spiders in every corner, webs between pillars
a small village church revealed to have always been a dark temple
anti_patterns: don't place the altar centered left-right but also centered front-back — the altar belongs at the apse
don't forget directionality — pews face one way, the axis leads the eye
avoid bright white lighting; sacred dim is the mood
